Common.tagline: AI-powered spelling and grammar correction, everywhere on Android.

Landing.heroTitle:
Write without mistakes,
without changing your style.
Landing.heroSubtitle: An Android keyboard that fixes your messages, emails and notes in one tap. No rewriting, just spelling and grammar.
Landing.feature1Body: Our AI fixes mistakes only: no rephrasing, no tone changes.
Landing.feature2Body: Our IME keyboard works in any app: WhatsApp, Gmail, Slack, your browser.
Landing.feature3Body: Your text is never stored. We only keep anonymous metrics for billing.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Plume, the Android keyboard that fixes your mistakes in one tap, without changing your style.
FAQ.metaTitle: FAQ Plume, the Android correction keyboard
FAQ.metaDescription: Answers to frequently asked questions about Plume: how it works, dyslexia, privacy, pricing, compatibility and comparisons (Scribens, Grammarly, ChatGPT, Gboard).
FAQ.ctaBody: Try Plume for free and see for yourself.

About.title: About Plume
About.subtitle: The story of Plume, told by its founder.
About.metaTitle: About — Plume, a keyboard born from a dyslexic's need
About.metaDescription: The story of Plume: Eloïse, 18 and dyslexic, and her father, a developer for over 30 years, created an Android keyboard that fixes mistakes with AI, right where you write.
About.intro: My name is Eloïse, I'm 18, and I'm dyslexic. Plume was born from my own need: to write without mistakes, simply, from my phone.
About.s1Body: I've been diagnosed with dyslexia since primary school, around age seven. And I've always wanted to be an entrepreneur. I had already built several websites that didn't take off, but I never let go of the idea of building something of my own.
About.s2Title: The ChatGPT detour, until it wore me out
About.s2Body: As I got started, I began reaching out to entrepreneurs on WhatsApp and other networks, from my phone. But I really didn't want to send messages full of mistakes. So I took a detour: I wrote my message in ChatGPT, asked it to fix it, copied the result, then pasted it into WhatsApp. A long, painful process that eventually got on my nerves.
About.s3Title: The spark, with my developer father
About.s3Body: I talked about it with my father, an IT developer for over 30 years, who has also been building websites on the side for years. He told me it was a great idea: to make an app that fixes messages right from the keyboard, using AI, so it would be far more capable than a classic spell-checker.
About.s4Body: That's how Plume came to be: by bringing together my problem as a dyslexic, my drive to build a company, and my father's expertise. Today, Plume helps you write without mistakes, without changing your style, right where you write.
About.ctaBody: Plume fixes your messages in one tap, without changing your style.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.intro: AiCorrect respects your privacy. This policy describes the data we collect, why, and how you stay in control.
Privacy.s1Body: We only collect your email address, your preferred language, and anonymized usage metrics (number of corrections, text length, latency, HTTP code). Texts submitted for correction are never stored on our servers.
Privacy.s2Body: Your data is used to: (a) authenticate you via email code, (b) bill your subscription, (c) provide the correction service through Mistral AI, (d) compute your monthly usage shown in the dashboard.
Privacy.s3Body: Processing is based on the performance of the service contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) for authentication, billing and correction. Aggregated metrics rely on our legitimate interest in measuring service quality.
Privacy.s4Body: We use: Mistral AI (France) for text correction; Stripe Payments (Ireland) for billing; Resend (United States, Standard Contractual Clauses) for delivering codes by email. No other data is shared.
Privacy.s5Body: Inactive accounts are deleted on request. Invoices are retained for 10 years per French commercial law. Usage metrics are kept as long as the account is active.
Privacy.s6Body: You have rights of access, rectification, erasure, portability and restriction. Export and deletion are available from your dashboard. For any other request, contact us at the email shown in the legal notice.
Privacy.s7Body: We only use a strictly necessary session cookie (httpOnly, SameSite=Lax) to keep you signed in. No tracking or advertising cookies.

Terms.dialogIntro: Please review and accept the terms before subscribing to the Pro plan.
Terms.acceptCheckbox: I accept the terms and conditions
Terms.title: Terms of use
Terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the AiCorrect service. By creating an account, you accept them.
Terms.s1Body: AiCorrect provides an AI-powered spelling and grammar correction service, accessible through an Android app and a web dashboard. The service is provided "as is" with no absolute availability guarantee.
Terms.s2Body: The Pro subscription is billed monthly via Stripe. A 2-month free trial is offered to new accounts. No card is charged during the trial period.
Terms.s3Body: You can cancel at any time from the dashboard. Access is retained until the end of the paid period. No pro-rated refunds are issued.
Terms.s4Body: You retain all rights to the texts you submit. AiCorrect never stores these texts and never uses them for training.
Terms.s5Body: AiCorrect is an assistance tool; you remain responsible for proofreading before sending. Our liability is limited to the amount paid over the last 12 months.
Terms.s6Body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of the courts of the publisher's registered office.

Imprint.title: Legal notice
Imprint.ipBody: All content on this site (text, images, code, logos) is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.
Imprint.contactBody: For any question: contact@aicorrect.app. For GDPR requests: privacy@aicorrect.app.
